common.name: Tail Swipe
common.description: Swing your tail around to attack 360 degrees of enemies.

common.name: Rock and Roll
common.description: Roll into a ball and then over your enemies.

common.name: Tennis Tail
common.description: Deflect incoming objects with your Tail Swipe.

common.name: Iron Tail
common.description: Tail Swipe does increased damage.

common.name: Summoning: Stone Projection
common.description: Press the tertiary attack button to summon a rock wall - hit it with your Tail Swipe to launch rocks.

common.name: Double Roll
common.description: Use the Roll attack for twice as long.

paths.name: Granite Dragon
paths.description: Further develop your Tail Swipe attack.

upgrades.name: Mace of Destruction
upgrades.description: Tail Swipe does MORE increased damage.

upgrades.name: Summoning: Stone Uppercut
upgrades.description: Stone Projection does increased damage.

upgrades.name: Gaia Hammer
upgrades.description: Hold the primary attack button to charge up the Tail Swipe and do extra damage.

upgrades.name: Pulver Roll
upgrades.description: Roll attack does increased damage.

upgrades.name: Earthen Force Roll
upgrades.description: Roll does MORE damage and can roll right through enemy attacks.

upgrades.name: Continental Boulder
upgrades.description: Becomes giant while rolling - roll faster and do even MORE damage.

extra.name: Triceratops Honor Guard
extra.description: New armor makes you harder to hit.

common.name: Tail Swipe
common.description: Swing your tail around to attack 360 degrees of enemies.

common.name: Rock and Roll
common.description: Roll into a ball and then over your enemies.

common.name: Tennis Tail
common.description: Deflect incoming objects with your Tail Swipe.

common.name: Iron Tail
common.description: Tail Swipe does increased damage.

common.name: Summoning: Stone Projection
common.description: Press the tertiary attack button to summon a rock wall - hit it with your Tail Swipe to launch rocks.

common.name: Double Roll
common.description: Use the Roll attack for twice as long.

paths.name: Granite Dragon
paths.description: Further develop your Tail Swipe attack.

upgrades.name: Mace of Destruction
upgrades.description: Tail Swipe does MORE increased damage.

upgrades.name: Summoning: Stone Uppercut
upgrades.description: Stone Projection does increased damage.

upgrades.name: Gaia Hammer
upgrades.description: Hold the primary attack button to charge up the Tail Swipe and do extra damage.

upgrades.name: Pulver Roll
upgrades.description: Roll attack does increased damage.

upgrades.name: Earthen Force Roll
upgrades.description: Roll does MORE damage and can roll right through enemy attacks.

upgrades.name: Continental Boulder
upgrades.description: Becomes giant while rolling - roll faster and do even MORE damage.

extra.name: Triceratops Honor Guard
extra.description: New armor makes you harder to hit.

extra.name: Rolling Thunder!
extra.description: While rolling, press the tertiary attack button to launch into the air and slam down.

common.name: Bat Attack
common.description: Press the primary attack button to shoot bitey pet bats out at enemies.

common.name: Bat Swarm
common.description: Press the secondary attack button to summon a maelstrom of Bat damage.

common.name: Healing Bite
common.description: Collect pet bats after they have bitten enemies to regain HP.

common.name: Brawny Bats
common.description: Pet bats last longer, do more damage, and are more aggressive.

common.name: Go Batty!
common.description: Press the tertiary attack button to transform into a Giant Bat! In Bat Form, press the primary attack button to bite and the secondary attack button to screech.

common.name: A Colony of Bats
common.description: Increase the maximum number of pet bats.

upgrades.name: Mr. Dizzy
upgrades.description: A new pet bat, Mr. Dizzy, will stun and confuse enemies.

upgrades.name: Mr. Blocky
upgrades.description: A new pet bat, Mr. Blocky, will protect you by deflecting projectiles.

upgrades.name: Mr. Bitey
upgrades.description: A new pet bat, Mr. Bitey, does extra biting damage.

upgrades.name: Bat-tle Cry
upgrades.description: In Bat Form, the screech attack does extra damage and powers up pet bats.

upgrades.name: Ultimate Bat Squad
upgrades.description: More pet bats fly with you and have additional powers.

upgrades.name: Chiropteran Call
upgrades.description: In Bat Form, the bite attack shoots out 3 additional pet bats.

extra.name: Great Ball of Bats
extra.description: Hold the primary attack button to launch a giant ball of bats!

common.name: Wing Whip
common.description: Press the primary attack button to perform a Wing Whip. Press (Square), (Square), (Square) for a combo attack.

common.name: Shadow Orbs
common.description: Press the secondary attack button to shoot Shadow Orbs, which leave behind Darkness energy shockwaves.

common.name: Black Hole
common.description: Press the tertiary attack button to open up Black Holes that pull enemies in - hold and release to teleport yourself.

common.name: Darkness Overload
common.description: Shoot a Shadow Orb into a Black Hole to create an explosive eruption.

common.name: Shadow Blade
common.description: Jump and press the primary attack button to turn into a spinning Shadow Blade.

common.name: Take It Back
common.description: Black Holes hold enemies longer and they do more damage.

upgrades.name: A Spinning Finish
upgrades.description: Press the primary attack button three times for a Ground Pound combo. Press it four times in a row to charge ahead as a Shadow Blade.

upgrades.name: Whip It Up
upgrades.description: Wing Whip, Shadow Blade and Warp Speed attacks do more damage.

upgrades.name: Warp Speed
upgrades.description: Hold the primary attack button to repeatedly teleport through enemies and piercing them with your horn.

upgrades.name: Dark Energy Clouds
upgrades.description: Shadow Orbs explode into massive Dark Energy Clouds, which damage enemies.

upgrades.name: Under the Cover of Darkness
upgrades.description: Blackout receives less damage when inside Dark Energy Clouds.

upgrades.name: Cloud Gravity
upgrades.description: Hold the secondary attack button to lift enemies inside a Dark Energy Cloud and damage all nearby enemies.

extra.name: Supernova Black Hole
extra.description: Shoot 2 Black Holes on top of each other to create a Supernova Black Hole.

common.name: Wing Slice
common.description: Press the primary attack button for a Wing Slice attack. Press it twice then hold for a Tail Stab combo.

common.name: Blade Shards
common.description: Press the secondary attack button to shoot Blade Shards into the ground, perform a Wing Slice to send them flying.

common.name: Cyclone Swirl
common.description: Press the tertiary attack button to create a Cyclone Swirl attack, damaging anything nearby.

common.name: Sharpened Wings
common.description: Wing Slice attacks do increased damage.

common.name: Shard Harder
common.description: Shoot more Blade Shards and at a farther distance.

common.name: Wind At Your Back
common.description: Cyclone Swirl now follows you around and does extra damage.

upgrades.name: Follow Like the Wind
upgrades.description: Cyclone Swirl follows you more closely and spins Blade Shards faster.

upgrades.name: Crushing Cyclones
upgrades.description: Enemies inside the Cyclone Swirl take increased damage from other attacks.

upgrades.name: Shielding Swirl
upgrades.description: Cyclone Swirl is bigger and can deflect enemy projectiles.

upgrades.name: Slice Shards
upgrades.description: Wing Slice attacks occasionally shoot Blade Shards.

upgrades.name: Cutting Edge
upgrades.description: Blade Shards do increased damage.

upgrades.name: Shard Shrapnel
upgrades.description: Blade Shards stick to enemies, causing more damage over time.

extra.name: Instant Swirl Shards
extra.description: Cyclone Swirls automatically contain Blade Shards.

common.name: Brainwaves
common.description: Press the primary attack button to blast nearby enemies with powerful Brainwaves.

common.name: Levitation
common.description: Press the secondary attack button to levitate enemies and smash them to the ground.

common.name: Tasty Waves
common.description: Hold the primary attack button to use the Brainwave attack for a longer duration.

common.name: Brain Freeze
common.description: Press the tertiary attack button to create energy balls that slow enemies down.

common.name: Brain Storm
common.description: Hold the primary attack button to charge up the Brainwave attack and release for a superpowered Brain Storm.

common.name: Down to Earth
common.description: Levitated enemies damage other nearby foes during the smashdown.

upgrades.name: Brain Blowout
upgrades.description: Press the primary attack button near levitating enemies for a massive knockback.

upgrades.name: Remote Control
upgrades.description: Hold the secondary attack button to charge up the Levitation attack and control enemies you levitate.

upgrades.name: Mind Mash
upgrades.description: While levitating an enemy, press any attack button to slam them down repeatedly.

upgrades.name: Mind Control
upgrades.description: Hold the tertiary attack button to create an energy ball that takes control of enemies' minds.

upgrades.name: The More the Merrier
upgrades.description: Levitation Field passes through enemies and can levitate multiple foes.

upgrades.name: Mind Blown
upgrades.description: Mind-Controlled enemies damage others after going back to normal.

extra.name: Lock Puzzle Psychic
extra.description: Hold the secondary attack button to charge up the Levitation attack and shoot Lock Puzzles with it to solve them instantly.
